text: Pilot commissioners other than the chair serve staggered terms of two years that expire on February 1.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.014 — Term of Office

Pilot commissioners other than the chair serve staggered terms of two years that expire on February 1.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1346 (S.B.1915), Sec. 5, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: Pilot commissioners other than the chair serve staggered terms of two years that expire on February 1.
